context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Visual indicator of cage enclosure, top edge decoration
context.screen_position: Top edge of screen, y=0 to y=8
context.usage_scenario: Always visible at top of screen. Provides context that view is inside a cage. Static decorative element.

visual_specification.shape: Horizontal pattern of vertical bars, evenly spaced
visual_specification.details: Pattern: vertical bars 2px wide, spaced 6px apart (2px bar, 6px gap, repeat). Bars extend from y=0 to y=8. Color: light gray (#C2C3C7). Approximately 16 bars across 128px width. Simple repeating pattern.

relationships.shared_with: Gray color scheme with UI elements
relationships.differences_from: perch: horizontal vs vertical orientation, brown vs gray. Background: patterned vs solid.

explicit_negations: Bars do not curve or bend
Bars do not animate or sway
Does not extend to bottom of screen
